mapper.sql: ra.application_id, ra.recruitment_id, r.title AS recruitment_title, ra.applicant_email, u.name AS applicant_name, ra.intro, ra.applied_at, ra.canceled_at, ra.viewed_at, ra.status, ra.is_bookmarked_by_company
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruitment_application ( recruitment_id, applicant_email, intro, status ) VALUES ( #{recruitmentId}, #{applicantEmail}, #{intro}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM recruitment_application ra LEFT JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.email = ra.applicant_email WHERE ra.application_id = #{applicationId}

SELECT
FROM recruitment_application ra INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.email = ra.applicant_email WHERE ra.recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY ra.applied_at DESC, ra.application_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment_application WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND status <> 'CANCELLED'
mapper.update: UPDATE recruitment_application SET viewed_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND viewed_at IS NULL
UPDATE recruitment_application SET status = 'CANCELLED', canceled_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND viewed_at IS NULL
